name: LabVIEW
description: National Instruments' graphical programming environment for test and measurement systems. The standard tool for rocket engine test stand instrumentation, data acquisition, and real-time control during ground testing.
whyUseIt: Every rocket engine test stand runs LabVIEW. It interfaces directly with sensors, valves, and data acquisition hardware to control and monitor test firings in real time. When SpaceX test-fires a Raptor engine, LabVIEW-based systems are capturing thousands of data channels.

vocabulary.definition: Virtual Instrument — a LabVIEW programme, so called because it mimics physical test instruments
Data Acquisition — the hardware and software that converts physical measurements to digital data

beginnerMistakes: Creating overly complex VI diagrams instead of modular sub-VIs
Not implementing proper timing for real-time applications
Ignoring data logging best practices during tests
